Price

---
title: "Electricity Price - Long- and Short-term Prediction"
author: "Thu Nguyen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Library 

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(rfBLT)
library(readr)
library(MCMCpack)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(zoo)
library(seasonal)
library(forecast)
library(plotly)
library(matrixStats)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(scatterplot3d)
library(purrr)
library(rsample)
library(grid)
library(plot3D)
```

# Function

```{r}
# Min-Max scaling
normalization_fn <- function(x){
    # mean_x <- mean(x)
    max_x <- max(x)
    min_x <- min(x)

    # norm_vec <- as.vector((x-mean_x)/(max_x-min_x))
    norm_vec <- as.vector((x-min_x)/(max_x-min_x))
    
    # return(list(norm_vec=norm_vec, mean_x=mean_x, max_x=max_x, min_x=min_x))
    return(list(norm_vec=norm_vec, max_x=max_x, min_x=min_x))
}

revert_fn <- function(x, max_org, min_org){
    return(x*(max_org-min_org)+min_org)
}

normalized_test <- function(x, max_org, min_org){
    norm_vec <- (x-min_org)/(max_org-min_org)
    return(norm_vec)
}
```

```{r}
# X11-ARIMA
trend_seasonal_x11_decomp <- function(df, fixed_point, s=12){
  train_data <- df[1:fixed_point,]
  test_data <- df[(fixed_point+1):nrow(df),]
  
  # Decompose train time series - Multiplicative
  train_freq_ts <- ts(train_data$Value, start = c(1987,  1), frequency = 12)
  train_decomp <- train_freq_ts %>% seas(x11="", transform.function = "log")

  # Seasonal 
  train_seasonal <- seasonal(train_decomp)

  # Trend + Remainder
  train_trend_remainder <- trend(train_decomp)*remainder(train_decomp)
  
  return(list(train_seasonal=train_seasonal, train_trend_remainder=train_trend_remainder))
}
```

```{r}
# rfBLT - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_rfBLT <- function(ts_dat, pred_size, window_size_rfBLTs=12, window_size_rfBLTtr=12, smooth_window_rfBLTtr=12, alpha=0.05, min_max=FALSE){
    # X11 decomposition - Multiplicative
    x11_decomp <- ts_dat %>% seas(x11="", transform.function = "log") 
    x11_seasonal_comp <- seasonal(x11_decomp)
    x11_trend_random <- trend(x11_decomp)*remainder(x11_decomp)

    # Fit Seasonal
    fit_rfBLTs <- ts_forecast_bayes_reg_rfm_taken(
        ts_data = as.vector(x11_seasonal_comp),
        time = 1:length(x11_seasonal_comp),
        smooth_diff = FALSE,
        # method = "ma",
        # smooth_params = list(window=6),
        window_size = window_size_rfBLTs,
        pred_size = pred_size,
        weight_dist = "normal",
        weight_params = list(),
        bias_dist = "uniform",
        bias_params = list(min_val = 0, max_val = 2*pi),
        act_func = "fourier",
        reg_type = "lasso",
        burnin = 2000,
        n.samples = 2000,
        thin = 1,
        n.cores = NULL,
        pred_type = "mean",
        feature_selection = "factor",
        feature_constant = 1,
        CI = 95
    )

    if (min_max==TRUE){
        normalize_res <- normalization_fn(x11_trend_random)
        train_vec <- normalize_res$norm_vec
        max_train <- normalize_res$max_x
        min_train <- normalize_res$min_x
    } else {
        train_vec <- x11_trend_random
    }
    
    # Fit Trend*Random
    fit_rfBLTtr <- ts_forecast_bayes_reg_rfm_taken(
        ts_data = as.vector(train_vec),
        time = 1:length(train_vec),
        smooth_diff = TRUE,
        method = "ma",
        smooth_params = list(window=smooth_window_rfBLTtr),
        window_size = window_size_rfBLTtr,
        pred_size = pred_size,
        weight_dist = "normal",
        weight_params = list(),
        bias_dist = "uniform",
        bias_params = list(min_val = 0, max_val = 2*pi),
        act_func = "fourier",
        reg_type = "lasso",
        burnin = 2000,
        n.samples = 2000,
        thin = 1,
        n.cores = NULL,
        pred_type = "mean",
        feature_selection = "factor",
        feature_constant = 1,
        CI = 95
    )

    if (min_max==TRUE){
        post_pred_trend <- revert_fn(x=fit_rfBLTtr$future_y_preds, max_org=max_train, min_org=min_train)
    } else {
        post_pred_trend <- fit_rfBLTtr$future_y_preds
    }

    # Predicted Posterior - Convert back to normal scale
    post_pred <- fit_rfBLTs$future_y_preds*post_pred_trend
    post_pred_mean <- colMeans(post_pred)
    post_pred_lower <- colQuantiles(post_pred, probs = c(alpha/2), na.rm = FALSE) 
    post_pred_upper <- colQuantiles(post_pred, probs = c(1-alpha/2), na.rm = FALSE)

    return(list(x11_seasonal_comp=x11_seasonal_comp,
                x11_trend_random=x11_trend_random,
                post_pred_rfBLT=post_pred, 
                post_pred_mean_rfBLT=post_pred_mean,
                post_pred_lower_rfBLT=post_pred_lower,
                post_pred_upper_rfBLT=post_pred_upper))
}
```

```{r}
# SARIMA - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_sarima <- function(ts_dat, pred_size){
    fit_sarima <- auto.arima(ts_dat, seasonal="TRUE")
    forecast_sarima <- forecast(fit_sarima, h=pred_size)
    pred_lower_sarima <- forecast_sarima$lower[,2]
    pred_upper_sarima <- forecast_sarima$upper[,2]
    pred_sarima <- forecast_sarima$mean

    return(list(pred_sarima=pred_sarima, pred_lower_sarima=pred_lower_sarima, pred_upper_sarima=pred_upper_sarima))
}
```

```{r}
# Holt-Winters' Additive - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_hw_add <- function(ts_dat, pred_size){
    fit_hw_add <- ets(ts_dat, model = "AAA")
    forecast_hw <- forecast(fit_hw_add, h=pred_size)
    pred_lower_hw_add <- forecast_hw$lower[,2]
    pred_upper_hw_add <- forecast_hw$upper[,2]
    pred_hw_add <- forecast_hw$mean

    return(list(pred_hw_add=pred_hw_add, pred_lower_hw_add=pred_lower_hw_add, pred_upper_hw_add=pred_upper_hw_add))
}
```

```{r}
# STL - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_slt <- function(ts_dat, pred_size){
    fit_slt <- stlf(ts_dat, method='arima', h = pred_size)
    forecast_slt <- forecast(fit_slt, h=pred_size)
    pred_lower_slt <- forecast_slt$lower[,2]
    pred_upper_slt <- forecast_slt$upper[,2]
    pred_slt <- forecast_slt$mean

    return(list(pred_slt=pred_slt, pred_lower_slt=pred_lower_slt, pred_upper_slt=pred_upper_slt))
}
```

```{r}
# Dynamic Harmonic Regression - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_dhr <- function(ts_dat, pred_size){
    # Find best k
    min_aicc <- Inf

    for(i in 1:6) {
      fit <- auto.arima(ts_dat, xreg=fourier(ts_dat, K=i), seasonal=FALSE)
      if(fit$aicc < min_aicc) {
        min_aicc <- fit$aicc
        best_k <- i
      }
    }
    
    fit_dhr <- auto.arima(ts_dat, xreg=fourier(ts_dat, K=best_k), seasonal=FALSE)
    forecast_dhr <- forecast(fit_dhr, xreg=fourier(ts_dat, K=best_k, h=pred_size))
    pred_lower_dhr <- forecast_dhr$lower[,2]
    pred_upper_dhr <- forecast_dhr$upper[,2]
    pred_dhr <- forecast_dhr$mean

    return(list(pred_dhr=pred_dhr, pred_lower_dhr=pred_lower_dhr, pred_upper_dhr=pred_upper_dhr))
}
```

```{r}
# TBATS - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_tbats <- function(ts_dat, pred_size){
    fit_tbats <- tbats(ts_dat)
    forecast_tbats <- forecast(fit_tbats, h=pred_size)
    pred_lower_tbats <- forecast_tbats$lower[,2]
    pred_upper_tbats <- forecast_tbats$upper[,2]
    pred_tbats <- forecast_tbats$mean

    return(list(pred_tbats=pred_tbats, pred_lower_tbats=pred_lower_tbats, pred_upper_tbats=pred_upper_tbats))
}
```

```{r}
# All methods - long-term prediction
long_term_pred_all <- function(ts_dat, pred_size, window_size_rfBLTs=12, window_size_rfBLTtr=12, smooth_window_rfBLTtr=12, alpha=0.05, min_max=FALSE){
    n = length(ts_dat)
    new_ts_dat <- ts(ts_dat[1:(n-pred_size)], start = c(1987,  1), frequency = 12)

    # rfBLT
    rfBLT_res <- long_term_pred_rfBLT(ts_dat=new_ts_dat, 
                                      pred_size=pred_size, 
                                      window_size_rfBLTs=window_size_rfBLTs, 
                                      window_size_rfBLTtr=window_size_rfBLTtr, 
                                      smooth_window_rfBLTtr=smooth_window_rfBLTtr,
                                      min_max=min_max,
                                      alpha=alpha)

    # SARIMA
    sarima_res <- long_term_pred_sarima(ts_dat=new_ts_dat, pred_size=pred_size)

    # Holt-Winters’ additive
    hw_add_res <- long_term_pred_hw_add(ts_dat=new_ts_dat, pred_size=pred_size)

    # SLT
    slt_res <- long_term_pred_slt(ts_dat=new_ts_dat, pred_size=pred_size)

    # Dynamic Harmonic Regression
    dhr_res <- long_term_pred_dhr(ts_dat=new_ts_dat, pred_size=pred_size)

    # TBATS
    tbats_res <- long_term_pred_tbats(ts_dat=new_ts_dat, pred_size=pred_size)

    return(list(rfBLT_res=rfBLT_res, 
                sarima_res=sarima_res,
                hw_add_res=hw_add_res,
                slt_res=slt_res,
                dhr_res=dhr_res,
                tbats_res=tbats_res))
}
```

```{r}
plot_forecast <- function(data,
                          month_col,
                          value_col,
                          pred_mean,
                          pred_lower,
                          pred_upper,
                          pred_size,
                          history_len = 50,
                          method_name = "Forecast",
                          y_label = "Value",
                          y_limits = NULL) {   # <-- NEW
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Basic checks
  # -----------------------------
  stopifnot(length(pred_mean)  == pred_size,
            length(pred_lower) == pred_size,
            length(pred_upper) == pred_size)
  
  n <- length(data[[value_col]])
  
  # True future values
  true_values <- data[[value_col]][(n - (pred_size - 1)):n]
  
  # Indices
  hist_start <- max(1, n - pred_size - history_len + 1)
  hist_end   <- n - pred_size
  pred_end   <- n
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Build dataframe
  # -----------------------------
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    month = data[[month_col]][hist_start:pred_end],
    
    observed = c(
      data[[value_col]][hist_start:hist_end],
      true_values
    ),
    
    predicted_mean = c(
      rep(NA, hist_end - hist_start + 1),
      pred_mean
    ),
    
    lower_95 = c(
      rep(NA, hist_end - hist_start + 1),
      pred_lower
    ),
    
    upper_95 = c(
      rep(NA, hist_end - hist_start + 1),
      pred_upper
    )
  )
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Base plot
  # -----------------------------
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = month)) +
    
    # geom_ribbon(
    #   aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, fill = "95% PI"),
    #   alpha = 0.2,
    #   na.rm = TRUE
    # ) +
    
    geom_line(
      aes(y = predicted_mean, color = "Prediction"),
      linewidth = 1.2,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    
    geom_line(
      aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"),
      linewidth = 1
    ) +
    
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = data[[month_col]][hist_end],
      linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
    
    labs(
      title = paste(method_name),
      x = "Month",
      y = y_label,
      color = "Legend" #,
      # fill = "Legend"
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Observed" = "gray40",
        "Prediction" = "red"
      )
    ) +
    
    # scale_fill_manual(
    #   values = c("95% PI" = "blue")
    # ) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10)
    )
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Optional y-axis scaling
  # -----------------------------
  if (!is.null(y_limits)) {
    p <- p + coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits)
  }
  
  return(p)
}
```

```{r}
# Compute percentage of coverage and their range
coverage_fn <- function(df_true, df_upper, df_lower) {
  # Percentage of Coverage
  prop_cover = colMeans(df_upper >= df_true & df_lower <= df_true)
  # Range of Coverage
  cr_range_mat = df_upper - df_lower
  return(list(prop_cover=prop_cover, cr_range_mat = cr_range_mat))
}
```

```{r}
# Generate a dataframe for predictions
create_forecast_df <- function(dat_vec, df_true, df_pred, df_lower, df_upper, start_index, end_index) {
  df_nrow <- nrow(df_true)
  df_ncol <- ncol(df_true)
  n_dat <- length(dat_vec)
  
  # Initialize data frame
  data <- data.frame(
    train_time = numeric(),
    forecast_day = numeric(),
    horizon = numeric(),
    predicted_mean = numeric(),
    lower_95 = numeric(),
    upper_95 = numeric(),
    observed = numeric()
  )
  
  # Loop through each row of df_true
  for (i in 1:df_nrow) {
    train_time <- df_true[i, 1]
    for (j in 2:df_ncol) {
      horizon <- j - 1
      forecast_day <- train_time + horizon
      if (forecast_day <= end_index) {
        new_row <- data.frame(
          train_time = train_time,
          forecast_day = forecast_day,
          horizon = horizon,
          predicted_mean = df_pred[i, j],
          lower_95 = df_lower[i, j],
          upper_95 = df_upper[i, j],
          observed = dat_vec[forecast_day]
        )
        data <- rbind(data, new_row)
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(data)
}
```

# Dataset

```{r}
electricity_per_KWH <- read_csv("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/X11-rfBLT/Electricity Price/electricity per KWH.csv")
electricity_per_KWH$MON <- as.integer(sub("^M0?(\\d+)$", "\\1", electricity_per_KWH$Period))
electricity_per_KWH$Month <- as.Date(paste(electricity_per_KWH$Year, 
                                           electricity_per_KWH$MON, "01", sep = "-"), 
                                     format = "%Y-%m-%d")
dim(electricity_per_KWH)
head(electricity_per_KWH)
```

```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 3.5}
color_main   <- "#2B6CB0"  
color_focus  <- "#E53E3E"  
color_inset  <- "#2B6CB0"  
color_bg     <- "#FAFAFA" 

ns_main_plot <- ggplot(electricity_per_KWH, aes(x = Month, y = Value)) +
  geom_line(color = color_main, alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.8) + 
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH") + #, title = "Monthly Electricity Price"
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 years", date_labels = "%Y") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    # CHANGED: Reduced from 180 to 130 to make the full plot taller
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
    plot.title = element_text(vjust = 3, face = "bold") # Lowered slightly to match the margin
  )

pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_price_data.pdf", width = 10, height = 3.5)
ns_main_plot
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# 3D plot
delta_t <- 1
ts_dat  <- electricity_per_KWH$Value
n       <- length(ts_dat)

df_3d <- data.frame(
  xt      = ts_dat[1:(n - 2 * delta_t)],
  xt_lag1 = ts_dat[(1 + delta_t):(n - delta_t)],
  xt_lag2 = ts_dat[(1 + 2 * delta_t):n]
)
# ----------------------
pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_static_3d_phase_space.pdf",
    width = 6, height = 5.5)

# Set margin parameters to make room for labels
par(mar = c(3, 3, 3, 4))

# Draw the static 3D line trajectory with a smooth color gradient
#    We map the color to 'xt' to replicate your viridis look
lines3D(
  x = df_3d$xt, 
  y = df_3d$xt_lag1, 
  z = df_3d$xt_lag2,
  colvar = df_3d$xt,          # Smoothly changes color based on temperature value
  col = hcl.colors(100, "Viridis"), # Matches your exact choice of colorscale
  lwd = 2,                  # Sharp, clear line thickness
  
  # --- PERSPECTIVE & ROTATION CONTROLS ---
  theta = 40,                 # Azimuth angle (Rotate horizontally to turn the box)
  phi = 20,                   # Colatitude angle (Rotate vertically to tilt up/down)
  
  # --- GRID & BOX STYLING ---
  bty = "g",                 # "b2" draws a modern gray background panel with gridlines
  ticktype = "detailed",      # Draws explicit numerical values on the axes edges
  colkey = list(length = 0.6, width = 0.4, cex.axis = 0.8), # Clean colorbar legend
  
  # --- LABELS ---
  xlab = "x(t)", 
  ylab = paste0("x(t + ", delta_t, ")"), 
  zlab = paste0("x(t + ", 2 * delta_t, ")"),
  cex.main = 0.9, cex.lab = 0.9, color.palette = "Viridis",
  cex.axis = 0.75
)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# ACF
pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_acf.pdf", width = 8, height = 5)
acf(as.numeric(electricity_per_KWH$Value), lag.max=250, main="")
dev.off()
```

# X11-ARIMA

```{r}
o_elec_ts <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value, start = c(1987,  1), frequency = 12)
x11_decomp <- o_elec_ts %>% seas(x11="", transform.function = "log") 
pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_x11.pdf", width = 8, height = 5)
autoplot(x11_decomp)
dev.off()
```

```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 3}
# Extract components cleanly
trend_comp    <- as.numeric(trend(x11_decomp)*remainder(x11_decomp))
seasonal_comp <- as.numeric(seasonal(x11_decomp))

# Compute ACF and format natively into Data Frames
get_acf_df <- function(series_data, max_lag = 250) {
  acf_obj <- acf(series_data, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE)
  # Drop lag 0 (which is always 1.0) so it doesn't distort the scale of your plot
  data.frame(
    Lag = acf_obj$lag[-1],
    ACF = acf_obj$acf[-1]
  )
}

df_trend_acf    <- get_acf_df(trend_comp)
df_seasonal_acf <- get_acf_df(seasonal_comp)

# Calculate the standard 95% confidence interval threshold bounds
ci_threshold <- 1.96 / sqrt(length(trend_comp))

# Build the custom ggplot structures (Empty main titles for LaTeX)
p_trend <- ggplot(df_trend_acf, aes(x = Lag, xend = Lag, y = 0, yend = ACF)) +
  geom_segment(color = "#2B6CB0", linewidth = 0.5) +  # Fixed function name here
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-ci_threshold, ci_threshold), color = "#E53E3E", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "", x = "Lag", y = "ACF") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

p_seasonal <- ggplot(df_seasonal_acf, aes(x = Lag, xend = Lag, y = 0, yend = ACF)) +
  geom_segment(color = "#9B2C2C", linewidth = 0.5) +  # Fixed function name here
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-ci_threshold, ci_threshold), color = "#E53E3E", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "", x = "Lag", y = "ACF") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# Combine side-by-side perfectly using patchwork
combined_acf_plots <- p_trend | p_seasonal

pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_comp_acf.pdf",
    width = 12, height = 3)
combined_acf_plots
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# 3D plot
# --- Data prep ---
delta_t <- 1
ts_dat  <- trend_comp
n       <- length(ts_dat)

df_3d <- data.frame(
  xt      = ts_dat[1:(n - 2 * delta_t)],
  xt_lag1 = ts_dat[(1 + delta_t):(n - delta_t)],
  xt_lag2 = ts_dat[(1 + 2 * delta_t):n]
)
# ----------------------
custom_blue_ramp <- colorRampPalette(c("#EBF8FF", "#2B6CB0"))

pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_trend_static_3d_phase_space.pdf",
    width = 6, height = 5.5)
# Set margin parameters to make room for labels
par(mar = c(3, 3, 3, 4))

# Draw the static 3D line trajectory with your custom blue gradient
lines3D(
  x = df_3d$xt, 
  y = df_3d$xt_lag1, 
  z = df_3d$xt_lag2,
  colvar = df_3d$xt,          
  
  # CHANGED: Replaced hcl.colors with your custom hex gradient
  col = custom_blue_ramp(100), 
  
  lwd = 2,                  
  
  # --- PERSPECTIVE & ROTATION CONTROLS ---
  theta = 40,                 
  phi = 20,                   
  
  # --- GRID & BOX STYLING ---
  bty = "g",                 
  ticktype = "detailed",      
  colkey = list(length = 0.6, width = 0.4, cex.axis = 0.8), 
  
  # --- LABELS ---
  xlab = "x(t)", 
  ylab = paste0("x(t + ", delta_t, ")"), 
  zlab = paste0("x(t + ", 2 * delta_t, ")"),
  cex.main = 0.9, cex.lab = 0.9, 
  cex.axis = 0.75
)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# --- Data prep ---
delta_t <- 1
ts_dat  <- seasonal_comp
n       <- length(ts_dat)

df_3d <- data.frame(
  xt      = ts_dat[1:(n - 2 * delta_t)],
  xt_lag1 = ts_dat[(1 + delta_t):(n - delta_t)],
  xt_lag2 = ts_dat[(1 + 2 * delta_t):n]
)
# ----------------------
custom_red_ramp <- colorRampPalette(c("#FFF5F5", "#9B2C2C"))

pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_seasonal_static_3d_phase_space.pdf",
    width = 6, height = 5.5)

# Set margin parameters to make room for labels
par(mar = c(3, 3, 3, 4))

# Draw the static 3D line trajectory with your custom red gradient
lines3D(
  x = df_3d$xt, 
  y = df_3d$xt_lag1, 
  z = df_3d$xt_lag2,
  colvar = df_3d$xt,          
  
  # UPDATED: Passing the new red gradient palette
  col = custom_red_ramp(100), 
  
  lwd = 2,                  
  
  # --- PERSPECTIVE & ROTATION CONTROLS ---
  theta = 40,                 
  phi = 20,                   
  
  # --- GRID & BOX STYLING ---
  bty = "g",                 
  ticktype = "detailed",      
  colkey = list(length = 0.6, width = 0.4, cex.axis = 0.8), 
  
  # --- LABELS ---
  xlab = "x(t)", 
  ylab = paste0("x(t + ", delta_t, ")"), 
  zlab = paste0("x(t + ", 2 * delta_t, ")"),
  cex.main = 0.9, cex.lab = 0.9, 
  cex.axis = 0.75
)
dev.off()
```

# 24-month prediction

```{r}
# Cross-validation
n <- nrow(electricity_per_KWH)
pred_size=24
embed_dim <- c(12, 15, 18, 21, 24)
df <- electricity_per_KWH[1:(n-pred_size),c(7, 5)]
colnames(df) <- c("date", "value")
nrow(df)

splits <- rolling_origin(
  df, 
  initial = 370,   
  assess = pred_size,     
  skip = 10,       
  cumulative = TRUE # Expanding window
)

# Create a list where each element is a list containing 'train' and 'test'
folds_list <- map(splits$splits, function(s) {
  list(
    train = analysis(s),
    test  = assessment(s)
  )
})

length(folds_list)
```

```{r}
# This will return a matrix: Rows = embed_dim, Columns = folds
mse_matrix_24m <- sapply(folds_list, function(fold) {
  
  # Inner loop over each dimension for this specific fold
  sapply(embed_dim, function(d) {
    
    # 1. Create the ts object
    new_ts_dat <- ts(fold$train[, 2], start = c(1987, 01), frequency = 12)
    
    # 2. Run the model
    rfBLT_res <- long_term_pred_rfBLT(
        ts_dat=new_ts_dat, 
        pred_size=pred_size, 
        window_size_rfBLTs=d, 
        window_size_rfBLTtr=d, 
        smooth_window_rfBLTtr=6, 
        min_max=FALSE,
        alpha=0.05
    )
    
    # 3. Calculate MSE for this d/fold combination
    mean((rfBLT_res$post_pred_mean_rfBLT - fold$test$value)^2)
  })
})

# Add names for clarity
rownames(mse_matrix_24m) <- paste0("dim_", embed_dim)
colnames(mse_matrix_24m) <- paste0("fold_", seq_along(folds_list))
```

```{r}
res_all_24m <- long_term_pred_all(ts_dat=electricity_per_KWH$Value, 
                                  pred_size=pred_size, 
                                  window_size_rfBLTs=embed_dim[which.min(final_mean_mse_24m)], 
                                  window_size_rfBLTtr=embed_dim[which.min(final_mean_mse_24m)],
                                  smooth_window_rfBLTtr=6, 
                                  min_max=FALSE,
                                  alpha=0.05)

save(# Long-term
    mse_matrix_24m, 
    res_all_24m, 

    file = "200726_electricity_x11_long_term_pred_results.RData"
)
```

```{r}
# Load results
load("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/X11-rfBLT/Electricity Price/200726_electricity_x11_long_term_pred_results.RData")
```

```{r}
# Plot prediction result
p_rfBLT_x11 <- plot_forecast(
  data = electricity_per_KWH,
  month_col = "Month",
  value_col = "Value",
  pred_mean = res_all_24m$rfBLT_res$post_pred_mean_rfBLT,
  pred_lower = res_all_24m$rfBLT_res$post_pred_lower_rfBLT,
  pred_upper = res_all_24m$rfBLT_res$post_pred_upper_rfBLT,
  pred_size = 24,
  history_len = 36,
  method_name = "X11-rfBLT",
  y_label = "Avg Price/KWH",
  y_limits = c(0.13, 0.2)
)

p_sarima <- plot_forecast(
  data = electricity_per_KWH,
  month_col = "Month",
  value_col = "Value",
  pred_mean = res_all_24m$sarima_res$pred_sarima,
  pred_lower = res_all_24m$sarima_res$pred_lower_sarima,
  pred_upper = res_all_24m$sarima_res$pred_upper_sarima,
  pred_size = 24,
  history_len = 36,
  method_name = "SARIMA",
  y_label = "Avg Price/KWH",
  y_limits = c(0.13, 0.2)
)

p_hw_add <- plot_forecast(
  data = electricity_per_KWH,
  month_col = "Month",
  value_col = "Value",
  pred_mean = res_all_24m$hw_add_res$pred_hw_add,
  pred_lower = res_all_24m$hw_add_res$pred_lower_hw_add,
  pred_upper = res_all_24m$hw_add_res$pred_upper_hw_add,
  pred_size = 24,
  history_len = 36,
  method_name = "Holt-Winters’ Additive",
  y_label = "Avg Price/KWH",
  y_limits = c(0.13, 0.2)
)

p_slt <- plot_forecast(
  data = electricity_per_KWH,
  month_col = "Month",
  value_col = "Value",
  pred_mean = res_all_24m$slt_res$pred_slt,
  pred_lower = res_all_24m$slt_res$pred_lower_slt,
  pred_upper = res_all_24m$slt_res$pred_upper_slt,
  pred_size = 24,
  history_len = 36,
  method_name = "STL",
  y_label = "Avg Price/KWH",
  y_limits = c(0.13, 0.2)
)

p_dhr <- plot_forecast(
  data = electricity_per_KWH,
  month_col = "Month",
  value_col = "Value",
  pred_mean = res_all_24m$dhr_res$pred_dhr,
  pred_lower = res_all_24m$dhr_res$pred_lower_dhr,
  pred_upper = res_all_24m$dhr_res$pred_upper_dhr,
  pred_size = 24,
  history_len = 36,
  method_name = "Dynamic Harmonic Regression",
  y_label = "Avg Price/KWH",
  y_limits = c(0.13, 0.2)
)

p_tbats <- plot_forecast(
  data = electricity_per_KWH,
  month_col = "Month",
  value_col = "Value",
  pred_mean = res_all_24m$tbats_res$pred_tbats,
  pred_lower = res_all_24m$tbats_res$pred_lower_tbats,
  pred_upper = res_all_24m$tbats_res$pred_upper_tbats,
  pred_size = 24,
  history_len = 36,
  method_name = "TBATS",
  y_label = "Avg Price/KWH",
  y_limits = c(0.13, 0.2)
)
```

```{r}
embed_dim <- c(12, 15, 18, 21, 24)
print("Cross-validation Mean MSE")
mse_matrix_24m
rowMeans(mse_matrix_24m)
embed_dim[which.min(rowMeans(mse_matrix_24m))]
```

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_long_term_forecast.pdf",
    width = 12, height = 8)
(p_rfBLT_x11|p_sarima)/(p_hw_add|p_slt)/(p_dhr|p_tbats)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# MSE
long_term_true <- electricity_per_KWH$Value[(nrow(electricity_per_KWH)-23):(nrow(electricity_per_KWH))]
long_mse_rfBLT <- mean((long_term_true-res_all_24m$rfBLT_res$post_pred_mean_rfBLT)^2)
long_mse_sarima <- mean((long_term_true-res_all_24m$sarima_res$pred_sarima)^2)
long_mse_hw_add <- mean((long_term_true-res_all_24m$hw_add_res$pred_hw_add)^2)
long_mse_slt <- mean((long_term_true-res_all_24m$slt_res$pred_slt)^2)
long_mse_dhr <- mean((long_term_true-res_all_24m$dhr_res$pred_dhr)^2)
long_mse_tbats <- mean((long_term_true-res_all_24m$tbats_res$pred_tbats)^2)

cbind(c("rfBLT", "SARIMA", "HWA", "STL", "DHR", "TBATS"),
c(long_mse_rfBLT, long_mse_sarima, long_mse_hw_add, long_mse_slt, long_mse_dhr, long_mse_tbats))
```

# 6-month prediction

```{r}
# --- Save true data ---
# Starting point for prediction
fixed_point <- 380
pred_size <- 6

# --- Create empty data frame to save results ---
start_train_point <- fixed_point
last_train_point <- nrow(electricity_per_KWH)-pred_size
df_nrow <- length(start_train_point:last_train_point)
df_ncol = pred_size+1

# True trend matrix corresponding to the each of each training period
df_true <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = df_ncol, nrow = df_nrow))
colnames(df_true) <- c("training_point", paste0("t", 1:pred_size))
df_true$training_point <- start_train_point:last_train_point

# Prediction trend matrix corresponding to the each of each training period
df_pred_rfBLT <- df_true
df_lower_rfBLT <- df_true
df_upper_rfBLT <- df_true

# Prediction seasonal matrix corresponding to the each of each training period
df_pred_seasonal <- df_true
df_lower_seasonal <- df_true
df_upper_seasonal <- df_true

# Prediction trend+seasonal matrix corresponding to the each of each training period
df_pred_all <- df_true
df_lower_all <- df_true
df_upper_all <- df_true

for (i in 1:df_nrow){
  end_period <- df_true[i, 1]
  
  vec_dat <- electricity_per_KWH$Value
  df_true[i, 2:df_ncol] <- vec_dat[(end_period+1):(end_period+pred_size)]
}

keep_point <- seq(min(df_true[,1]), max(df_true[,1]), 15)
```

```{r}
# --- Cross-validation ---
embed_dim <- c(12, 15, 18, 21, 24)
df <- electricity_per_KWH[1:fixed_point,c(7,5)]
colnames(df) <- c("date", "value")
nrow(df)
head(df)

splits <- rolling_origin(
  df, 
  initial = 320,   
  assess = pred_size,     
  skip = 10,       
  cumulative = TRUE # Expanding window
)

# Create a list where each element is a list containing 'train' and 'test'
folds_list <- map(splits$splits, function(s) {
  list(
    train = analysis(s),
    test  = assessment(s)
  )
})

length(folds_list)

# This will return a matrix: Rows = embed_dim, Columns = folds
mse_matrix_6m <- sapply(folds_list, function(fold) {
  
  # Inner loop over each dimension for this specific fold
  sapply(embed_dim, function(d) {
    
    # 1. Create the ts object
    new_ts_dat <- ts(fold$train[, 2], start = c(1987, 01), frequency = 12)
    
    # 2. Run the model
    rfBLT_res <- long_term_pred_rfBLT(
        ts_dat=new_ts_dat, 
        pred_size=pred_size, 
        window_size_rfBLTs=d, 
        window_size_rfBLTtr=d, 
        smooth_window_rfBLTtr=12, 
        min_max=FALSE,
        alpha=0.05
    )
    
    # 3. Calculate MSE for this d/fold combination
    mean((rfBLT_res$post_pred_mean_rfBLT - fold$test$value)^2)
  })
})

# Add names for clarity
rownames(mse_matrix_6m) <- paste0("dim_", embed_dim)
colnames(mse_matrix_6m) <- paste0("fold_", seq_along(folds_list))
```

```{r}
# --- Fit rfBLT for Trend*Irregular ---
# 1. Define the worker function
process_rfBLT <- function(i, df_true, electricity_per_KWH, window_size, pred_size) {
  index <- df_true[i, 1]
  res <- trend_seasonal_x11_decomp(df = electricity_per_KWH, fixed_point = index)
  
  train_vec <- as.vector(res$train_trend_remainder)[1:index]
  train_mat <- embed(train_vec, (window_size + 1))
  
  # Fit model
  fit_rfBLT <- ts_forecast_bayes_reg_rfm_taken(
    ts_data = as.vector(train_vec),
    time = 1:length(train_vec),
    smooth_diff = TRUE,
    method = "ma",
    smooth_params = list(window = 6),
    window_size = window_size,
    pred_size = pred_size,
    weight_dist = "normal",
    weight_params = list(),
    bias_dist = "uniform",
    bias_params = list(min_val = 0, max_val = 2*pi),
    act_func = "fourier",
    reg_type = "lasso",
    burnin = 2000,
    n.samples = 2000,
    thin = 1,
    n.cores = NULL, # Handled by the apply wrapper if needed
    pred_type = "mean",
    feature_selection = "factor",
    feature_constant = 1,
    CI = 95
  )
  
  # Residuals and ACF
  residuals <- train_mat[, 1] - fit_rfBLT$fitted.values
  residual_acf <- acf(residuals, lag.max = 249, plot = FALSE)$acf
  
  # Return a named list of all outputs for this iteration
  list(
    residuals = residuals,
    acf = as.vector(residual_acf),
    coef = fit_rfBLT$posterior_samples,
    sigma2 = fit_rfBLT$posterior_sigma2,
    ess = fit_rfBLT$ess,
    pred_trend = fit_rfBLT$future_y_preds,
    y_pred = fit_rfBLT$y_pred,
    ci = fit_rfBLT$pred.ci
  )
}

# 2. Run the process (Functional way)
# Replace 'lapply' with 'future_lapply' if you use the 'future.apply' package for speed.
results <- lapply(1:df_nrow, process_rfBLT, 
                  df_true = df_true, 
                  electricity_per_KWH = electricity_per_KWH, 
                  window_size = embed_dim[which.min(final_mean_mse_6m)],
                  pred_size = pred_size)

# 3. Post-process the results back into your matrices/lists
coef_list   <- lapply(results, `[[`, "coef")
sigma2_list <- lapply(results, `[[`, "sigma2")
ess_list    <- lapply(results, `[[`, "ess")
pred_trend_list <- lapply(results, `[[`, "pred_trend")

# Fill Matrices using row binding or manual assignment
# ACF matrix (excluding the first column which is training_point)
df_residuals_acf <- matrix(NA, nrow=df_nrow, ncol=251)
df_residuals_acf[,1] <- df_true[,1]
colnames(df_residuals_acf) <- c("training_point", paste0(0:(ncol(df_residuals_acf)-2)))
df_residuals_acf[, -1] <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, `[[`, "acf"))

# Predictions and CI matrices
df_pred_rfBLT[, 2:df_ncol]  <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, `[[`, "y_pred"))
df_lower_rfBLT[, 2:df_ncol] <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) x$ci[, 1]))
df_upper_rfBLT[, 2:df_ncol] <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) x$ci[, 2]))

# Residuals training matrix (handling potential length mismatches)
residual_trend_train_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow=df_nrow, ncol=nrow(electricity_per_KWH))
for(i in 1:df_nrow) {
  resids <- results[[i]]$residuals
  residual_trend_train_mat[i, 1:length(resids)] <- resids
}

# --- Save diagnostic result ---
# Effective Sample Size
pdf("rfBLTtr_6m_ess.pdf", width=7, height=5)
par(mfrow=c(1, 1))
for (i in 1:df_nrow){
    plot(ess_list[[i]])
}
dev.off()

# ACF and QQ plots of residuals
pdf("rfBLTtr_6m_residuals.pdf", width=10, height=4)
par(mfrow=c(1, 2))
for (i in 1:nrow(df_residuals_acf)){
  # ACF of residuals
  plot(df_residuals_acf[i, -1], type="h", ylab="ACF", xlab="Lag", main=paste(i))
  # QQ plot of residuals
  qqnorm(na.omit(residual_trend_train_mat[i,]), main=paste(i))
  qqline(na.omit(residual_trend_train_mat[i,]))
}
dev.off()

# Trace plots of coefficients
pdf("rfBLTtr_6m_coefs_samples.pdf", width=15, height=20)
par(mfrow=c(6, 3))
for (i in 1:ncol(coef_list[[df_nrow]])){
  plot(coef_list[[df_nrow]][,i], type="l", main=paste0("Tract plot of Beta ", i-1), ylab=paste0("Beta ", i-1))
  hist(coef_list[[df_nrow]][,i], probability = TRUE, main=paste0("Density of Beta ", i-1), xlab=paste0("Beta ", i-1))
  boxplot(coef_list[[df_nrow]][,i], horizontal=TRUE, main=paste0("Box plot of Beta ", i-1))
}
dev.off()

# Trace plot of sigma2
pdf("rfBLTtr_6m_sigma2_samples.pdf", width=15, height=4)
par(mfrow=c(1, 3))
plot(sigma2_list[[df_nrow]], type="l", ylab="Sigma2", main="Trace plot of Sigma2")
hist(sigma2_list[[df_nrow]], probability = TRUE, main=paste0("Density of Sigma2"), xlab=paste0("Sigma2"))
boxplot(sigma2_list[[df_nrow]], horizontal=TRUE, main="Box plot of Sigma2")
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# --- Fit rfBLT for seasonal component ---
# 1. Define the worker function for the seasonal component
process_seasonal_rfBLT <- function(i, df_true, electricity_per_KWH, pred_size, window_size) {
  index <- df_true[i, 1]
  res <- trend_seasonal_x11_decomp(df = electricity_per_KWH, fixed_point = index)
  
  # Focus on the seasonal component
  train_vec <- as.vector(res$train_seasonal)[1:index]
  train_mat <- embed(train_vec, (window_size+1)) # Window size + 1
  
  # Fit model
  fit_rfBLT <- ts_forecast_bayes_reg_rfm_taken(
    ts_data = as.vector(train_vec),
    time = 1:length(train_vec),
    smooth_diff = FALSE,
    window_size = window_size,
    pred_size = pred_size,
    weight_dist = "normal",
    weight_params = list(),
    bias_dist = "uniform",
    bias_params = list(min_val = 0, max_val = 2 * pi),
    act_func = "fourier",
    reg_type = "lasso",
    burnin = 2000,
    n.samples = 2000,
    thin = 1,
    n.cores = NULL,
    pred_type = "mean",
    feature_selection = "factor",
    feature_constant = 1,
    CI = 95
  )
  
  # Calculate Residuals and ACF
  residuals <- train_mat[, 1] - fit_rfBLT$fitted.values
  residual_acf <- acf(residuals, lag.max = 249, plot = FALSE)$acf
  
  # Return results as a structured list
  list(
    residuals = residuals,
    acf = as.vector(residual_acf),
    coef = fit_rfBLT$posterior_samples,
    sigma2 = fit_rfBLT$posterior_sigma2,
    ess = fit_rfBLT$ess,
    pred_seasonal = fit_rfBLT$future_y_preds,
    y_pred = fit_rfBLT$y_pred,
    ci = fit_rfBLT$pred.ci
  )
}

# 2. Execute using lapply (or future_lapply for parallel speed)
results_seasonal <- lapply(1:df_nrow, process_seasonal_rfBLT, 
                           df_true = df_true, 
                           electricity_per_KWH = electricity_per_KWH, 
                           pred_size = pred_size, 
                           window_size = embed_dim[which.min(final_mean_mse_6m)])

# 3. Aggregate results back into your original structures
coef_rfBLTs_list   <- lapply(results_seasonal, `[[`, "coef")
sigma2_rfBLTs_list <- lapply(results_seasonal, `[[`, "sigma2")
ess_rfBLTs_list    <- lapply(results_seasonal, `[[`, "ess")
pred_seasonal_list <- lapply(results_seasonal, `[[`, "pred_seasonal")

# Map values back to matrices
df_residuals_seasonal_acf <- matrix(NA, nrow=df_nrow, ncol=251)
df_residuals_seasonal_acf[,1] <- df_true[,1]
colnames(df_residuals_seasonal_acf) <- c("training_point", paste0(0:(ncol(df_residuals_seasonal_acf)-2)))

df_residuals_seasonal_acf[, -1] <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_seasonal, `[[`, "acf"))
df_pred_seasonal[, 2:df_ncol]    <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_seasonal, `[[`, "y_pred"))
df_lower_seasonal[, 2:df_ncol]   <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_seasonal, function(x) x$ci[, 1]))
df_upper_seasonal[, 2:df_ncol]   <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_seasonal, function(x) x$ci[, 2]))

# Fill the training residual matrix (accounting for potential length differences)
residual_seasonal_train_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow=df_nrow, ncol=nrow(electricity_per_KWH))
for(i in 1:df_nrow) {
  resids <- results_seasonal[[i]]$residuals
  residual_seasonal_train_mat[i, 1:length(resids)] <- resids
}

# --- Save diagnostic result ---
# Effective sample size
pdf("rfBLTs_6m_ess.pdf", width=7, height=5)
par(mfrow=c(1, 1))
for (i in 1:df_nrow){
    plot(ess_rfBLTs_list[[i]])
}
dev.off()

# ACF and QQ plots of residuals
pdf("rfBLTs_6m_residuals.pdf", width=10, height=4)
par(mfrow=c(1, 2))
for (i in 1:nrow(df_residuals_seasonal_acf)){
  # ACF of residuals
  plot(df_residuals_seasonal_acf[i, -1], type="h", ylab="ACF", xlab="Lag", main=paste(i))
  # QQ plot of residuals
  qqnorm(na.omit(residual_seasonal_train_mat[i,]), main=paste(i))
  qqline(na.omit(residual_seasonal_train_mat[i,]))
}
dev.off()

# Trace plots of coefficients
pdf("rfBLTs_6m_coefs_samples.pdf", width=15, height=20)
par(mfrow=c(6, 3))
for (i in 1:ncol(coef_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]])){
  plot(coef_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]][,i], type="l", main=paste0("Tract plot of Beta ", i-1), ylab=paste0("Beta ", i-1))
  hist(coef_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]][,i], probability = TRUE, main=paste0("Density of Beta ", i-1), xlab=paste0("Beta ", i-1))
  boxplot(coef_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]][,i], horizontal=TRUE, main=paste0("Box plot of Beta ", i-1))
}
dev.off()

# Trace plot of sigma2
pdf("rfBLTs_6m_sigma2_samples.pdf", width=15, height=4)
par(mfrow=c(1, 3))
plot(sigma2_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]], type="l", ylab="Sigma2", main="Trace plot of Sigma2")
hist(sigma2_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]], probability = TRUE, main=paste0("Density of Sigma2"), xlab=paste0("Sigma2"))
boxplot(sigma2_rfBLTs_list[[df_nrow]], horizontal=TRUE, main="Box plot of Sigma2")
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# --- Combine all for X11-rfBLT ---
df_ncol <- ncol(df_true)
df_nrow <- nrow(df_true)
alpha <- 0.05

combine_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_list <- list()

df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all <- matrix(NA, ncol=ncol(df_true), nrow=nrow(df_true))
df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all[,1] <- df_true[,1]
df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all <- df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all
df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all <- df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all

colnames(df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all) <- c("training_point", paste0("t",1:pred_size))
colnames(df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all) <- c("training_point", paste0("t",1:pred_size))
colnames(df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all) <- c("training_point", paste0("t",1:pred_size))

for (i in 1:length(pred_trend_list)){
  combine_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_list[[i]] <- pred_seasonal_list[[i]]*pred_trend_list[[i]]
  pred_all_sample <- t(pred_seasonal_list[[i]]*pred_trend_list[[i]])
  
  pred_post_all_mean <- rowMeans(pred_all_sample)
  pred_post_all_lower <- rep(NA, pred_size)
  pred_post_all_upper <- rep(NA, pred_size)
  for (j in 1:pred_size){
    pred_post_all_lower[j] <- quantile(pred_all_sample[j,], prob=alpha/2)
    pred_post_all_upper[j] <- quantile(pred_all_sample[j,], prob=1-alpha/2)
  } 
  
  df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all[i, 2:df_ncol] <- pred_post_all_mean
  df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all[i, 2:df_ncol] <- pred_post_all_lower
  df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all[i, 2:df_ncol] <- pred_post_all_upper
}
```

```{r}
# --- SARIMA ---
df_pred_sarima <- df_true
df_lower_sarima <- df_true
df_upper_sarima <- df_true
 
for (i in 1:df_nrow){
   # Train data vec 
   vec_data <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value[1:df_true[i,1]], start = c(1987,  01), frequency = 12)
   
   # Fit seasonal ARIMA
   sarima_fit <- auto.arima(vec_data, seasonal="TRUE")
   
   # Forecast
   sarima_forecast_values <- forecast(sarima_fit, h=pred_size)
   
   df_pred_sarima[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(sarima_forecast_values$mean)
   df_lower_sarima[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(sarima_forecast_values$lower[,2])
   df_upper_sarima[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(sarima_forecast_values$upper[,2])
}
```

```{r}
# --- Holt-Winters’ additive method ---
df_pred_hw_additive <- df_true
df_lower_hw_additive <- df_true
df_upper_hw_additive <- df_true

for (i in 1:df_nrow){
  # Train data vec 
  vec_data <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value[1:df_true[i,1]], start = c(1987,  01), frequency = 12)
  
  # Fit HW
  hw_additive_fit <- ets(vec_data, model = "AAA")
  
  # Forecast
  hw_additive_forecast_values <- forecast(hw_additive_fit, h=pred_size)
  
  df_pred_hw_additive[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(hw_additive_forecast_values$mean)
  df_lower_hw_additive[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(hw_additive_forecast_values$lower[,2])
  df_upper_hw_additive[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(hw_additive_forecast_values$upper[,2])
}
```

```{r}
# --- TBATS ---
df_pred_tbats <- df_true
df_lower_tbats <- df_true
df_upper_tbats <- df_true

for (i in 1:df_nrow){
  # Train data vec 
  vec_data <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value[1:df_true[i,1]], start = c(1987,  01), frequency = 12)
  
  # Fit TBATS
  tbats_fit <-tbats(vec_data) 
  
  # Forecast
  tbats_forecast_values <- forecast(tbats_fit, h=pred_size)
  
  df_pred_tbats[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(tbats_forecast_values$mean)
  df_lower_tbats[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(tbats_forecast_values$lower[,2])
  df_upper_tbats[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(tbats_forecast_values$upper[,2])
}
```

```{r}
# --- STL ---
df_pred_slt <- df_true
df_lower_slt <- df_true
df_upper_slt <- df_true

for (i in 1:df_nrow){
  # Train data vec 
  vec_data <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value[1:df_true[i,1]], start = c(1987,  01), frequency = 12)
  
  # Fit SLT
  slt_fit <- stlf(vec_data, method='arima')
  
  # Forecast
  slt_forecast_values <- forecast(slt_fit, h=pred_size)
  
  df_pred_slt[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(slt_forecast_values$mean)
  df_lower_slt[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(slt_forecast_values$lower[,2])
  df_upper_slt[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(slt_forecast_values$upper[,2])
}
```

```{r}
# --- Dynamic Harmonic Regression ---
best_k <- 1
min_aicc <- Inf

ts_data <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value[1:df_true[1,1]], start = c(1987,  01), frequency = 12)

for(i in 1:6) {
  fit <- auto.arima(ts_data, xreg=fourier(ts_data, K=i), seasonal=FALSE)
  if(fit$aicc < min_aicc) {
    min_aicc <- fit$aicc
    best_k <- i
  }
}
best_k

df_pred_dhr <- df_true
df_lower_dhr <- df_true
df_upper_dhr <- df_true

for (i in 1:df_nrow){
  # Train data vec 
  vec_data <- ts(electricity_per_KWH$Value[1:df_true[i,1]], start = c(1987,  01), frequency = 12)
  
  # Fit DHR
  dhr_fit <-auto.arima(vec_data, xreg=fourier(vec_data, K=best_k), seasonal=FALSE)
  
  # Forecast
  dhr_forecast_values <- forecast(dhr_fit, xreg=fourier(vec_data, K=best_k, h=pred_size))
  
  df_pred_dhr[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(dhr_forecast_values$mean)
  df_lower_dhr[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(dhr_forecast_values$lower[,2])
  df_upper_dhr[i, 2:df_ncol] <- as.vector(dhr_forecast_values$upper[,2])
}
```

```{r}
# --- Save results ---
save(# Short-term
    df_true,

    # SARIMA 
    df_pred_sarima, 
    df_lower_sarima, 
    df_upper_sarima, 

    # HW add
    df_pred_hw_additive, 
    df_lower_hw_additive, 
    df_upper_hw_additive,

    # TBATS
    df_pred_tbats, 
    df_lower_tbats, 
    df_upper_tbats,

    # SLT
    df_pred_slt,
    df_lower_slt, 
    df_upper_slt, 

    # DHR
    df_pred_dhr, 
    df_lower_dhr, 
    df_upper_dhr,
    
    # rfBLT
    combine_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_list,
    mse_matrix_6m,
    df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all,
    df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all,
    df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all,

    file = "200726_electricity_x11_pred_6m_results.RData"
)

# Save diagnostic results
save(residual_trend_train_mat,
     df_residuals_acf,

     # Predict trend using rfBLT
     pred_trend_list,
     coef_list,
     sigma2_list,
     ess_list,
    
     df_pred_rfBLT, 
     df_lower_rfBLT,
     df_upper_rfBLT,
     
     file = "200726_electricity_x11_trend_pred_6m_results.RData")

save(residual_seasonal_train_mat, 
     df_residuals_seasonal_acf,
     
     # Predict seasonal part for rfBLT and rfBL
     pred_seasonal_list,
     coef_rfBLTs_list,
     sigma2_rfBLTs_list,
     ess_rfBLTs_list,  
    
     df_pred_seasonal,
     df_lower_seasonal,
     df_upper_seasonal,
    
     file = "200726_electricity_x11_seasonal_pred_6m_results.RData")
```

```{r}
# Load result
load("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/X11-rfBLT/Electricity Price/200726_electricity_x11_pred_6m_results.RData")
keep_point <- seq(min(df_true[,1]), max(df_true[,1]), 15)
df_time <- data.frame(forecast_day=(fixed_point+1):nrow(electricity_per_KWH), 
                      month=as.character(electricity_per_KWH$Month[(fixed_point+1):nrow(electricity_per_KWH)]))
```

```{r}
print("Cross-validation Mean MSE")
mse_matrix_6m
rowMeans(mse_matrix_6m)
embed_dim[which.min(rowMeans(mse_matrix_6m))]
```

```{r}
# ---- Visualization ----
# --- rfBLT ---
res_rfBLT <- coverage_fn(
  df_true = df_true,
  df_upper = df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all,
  df_lower = df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all
)

# Create a forecast dataframe
rfBLT_output_df <- create_forecast_df(
  dat_vec = as.vector(electricity_per_KWH$Value), 
  df_true = df_true, 
  df_pred = df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all, 
  df_lower = df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all, 
  df_upper = df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all, 
  start_index = fixed_point,
  end_index = nrow(electricity_per_KWH))

rfBLT_output_df <- merge(rfBLT_output_df, df_time, by = "forecast_day", all.x = TRUE)
rfBLT_output_df$month <- ymd(rfBLT_output_df$month)

p_rfBLT_full <- ggplot(rfBLT_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "X11-rfBLT",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

filtered_rfBLT_output_df <- rfBLT_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_mean = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, predicted_mean, NA_real_),
    lower_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, lower_95, NA_real_),
    upper_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, upper_95, NA_real_)
  )

# Visualize the expanding window forecasting
p_rfBLT_filtered <- ggplot(filtered_rfBLT_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "X11-rfBLT",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

# --- SARIMA ---
res_sarima <- coverage_fn(
  df_true = df_true,
  df_upper = df_upper_sarima,
  df_lower = df_lower_sarima
)

# Create a forecast dataframe
sarima_output_df <- create_forecast_df(
  dat_vec = as.vector(electricity_per_KWH$Value), 
  df_true = df_true, 
  df_pred = df_pred_sarima, 
  df_lower = df_lower_sarima, 
  df_upper = df_upper_sarima, 
  start_index = fixed_point,
  end_index = nrow(electricity_per_KWH))

sarima_output_df <- merge(sarima_output_df, df_time, by = "forecast_day", all.x = TRUE)
sarima_output_df$month <- ymd(sarima_output_df$month)

p_sarima_full <- ggplot(sarima_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "SARIMA",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

filtered_sarima_output_df <- sarima_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_mean = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, predicted_mean, NA_real_),
    lower_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, lower_95, NA_real_),
    upper_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, upper_95, NA_real_)
  )

# Visualize the expanding window forecasting
p_sarima_filtered <- ggplot(filtered_sarima_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "SARIMA",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

# --- Holt-Winters' Additive ---
res_hw_additive <- coverage_fn(
  df_true = df_true,
  df_upper = df_upper_hw_additive,
  df_lower = df_lower_hw_additive
)

# Create a forecast dataframe
hw_additive_output_df <- create_forecast_df(
  dat_vec = as.vector(electricity_per_KWH$Value), 
  df_true = df_true, 
  df_pred = df_pred_hw_additive, 
  df_lower = df_lower_hw_additive, 
  df_upper = df_upper_hw_additive, 
  start_index = fixed_point,
  end_index = nrow(electricity_per_KWH))

hw_additive_output_df <- merge(hw_additive_output_df, df_time, by = "forecast_day", all.x = TRUE)
hw_additive_output_df$month <- ymd(hw_additive_output_df$month)

p_hw_additive_full <- ggplot(hw_additive_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Holt-Winters' Additive",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

filtered_hw_additive_output_df <- hw_additive_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_mean = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, predicted_mean, NA_real_),
    lower_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, lower_95, NA_real_),
    upper_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, upper_95, NA_real_)
  )

# Visualize the expanding window forecasting
p_hw_additive_filtered <- ggplot(filtered_hw_additive_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Holt-Winters' Additive",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

# --- STL ---
res_slt <- coverage_fn(
  df_true = df_true,
  df_upper = df_upper_slt,
  df_lower = df_lower_slt
)

# Create a forecast dataframe
slt_output_df <- create_forecast_df(
  dat_vec = as.vector(electricity_per_KWH$Value), 
  df_true = df_true, 
  df_pred = df_pred_slt, 
  df_lower = df_lower_slt, 
  df_upper = df_upper_slt, 
  start_index = fixed_point,
  end_index = nrow(electricity_per_KWH))

slt_output_df <- merge(slt_output_df, df_time, by = "forecast_day", all.x = TRUE)
slt_output_df$month <- ymd(slt_output_df$month)

p_slt_full <- ggplot(slt_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "STL",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

filtered_slt_output_df <- slt_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_mean = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, predicted_mean, NA_real_),
    lower_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, lower_95, NA_real_),
    upper_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, upper_95, NA_real_)
  )

# Visualize the expanding window forecasting
p_slt_filtered <- ggplot(filtered_slt_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "STL",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

# --- Dynamic Harmonic Regression ---
res_dhr <- coverage_fn(
  df_true = df_true,
  df_upper = df_upper_dhr,
  df_lower = df_lower_dhr
)

# Create a forecast dataframe
dhr_output_df <- create_forecast_df(
  dat_vec = as.vector(electricity_per_KWH$Value), 
  df_true = df_true, 
  df_pred = df_pred_dhr, 
  df_lower = df_lower_dhr, 
  df_upper = df_upper_dhr, 
  start_index = fixed_point,
  end_index = nrow(electricity_per_KWH))

dhr_output_df <- merge(dhr_output_df, df_time, by = "forecast_day", all.x = TRUE)
dhr_output_df$month <- ymd(dhr_output_df$month)

p_dhr_full <- ggplot(dhr_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Dynamic Harmonic Regression",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

filtered_dhr_output_df <- dhr_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_mean = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, predicted_mean, NA_real_),
    lower_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, lower_95, NA_real_),
    upper_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, upper_95, NA_real_)
  )

# Visualize the expanding window forecasting
p_dhr_filtered <- ggplot(filtered_dhr_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Dynamic Harmonic Regression",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

# --- TBATS ---
res_tbats <- coverage_fn(
  df_true = df_true,
  df_upper = df_upper_tbats,
  df_lower = df_lower_tbats
)

# Create a forecast dataframe
tbats_output_df <- create_forecast_df(
  dat_vec = as.vector(electricity_per_KWH$Value), 
  df_true = df_true, 
  df_pred = df_pred_tbats, 
  df_lower = df_lower_tbats, 
  df_upper = df_upper_tbats, 
  start_index = fixed_point,
  end_index = nrow(electricity_per_KWH))

tbats_output_df <- merge(tbats_output_df, df_time, by = "forecast_day", all.x = TRUE)
tbats_output_df$month <- ymd(tbats_output_df$month)

p_tbats_full <- ggplot(tbats_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "TBATS",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))

filtered_tbats_output_df <- tbats_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_mean = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, predicted_mean, NA_real_),
    lower_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, lower_95, NA_real_),
    upper_95       = ifelse(train_time %in% keep_point, upper_95, NA_real_)
  )

# Visualize the expanding window forecasting
p_tbats_filtered <- ggplot(filtered_tbats_output_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, ymax = upper_95, group = train_time, fill = "95% CI"),
              alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted_mean, group = train_time, color = "Predicted Mean"), 
            alpha = 2, size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = observed, color = "Observed"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "TBATS",
       x = "Month", y = "Avg Price/KWH",
       color = "Legend", fill = "Legend") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Predicted Mean" = "red", "Observed" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("95% CI" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.12, 0.2))
```

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=12, warning=FALSE}
pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_6m_forecast_full.pdf",
    width = 12, height = 8)
(p_rfBLT_full | p_sarima_full)/(p_hw_additive_full | p_slt_full)/(p_dhr_full | p_tbats_full)
dev.off()
```

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=12, warning=FALSE}
pdf("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_6m_forecast_filtered.pdf",
    width = 12, height = 8)
(p_rfBLT_filtered | p_sarima_filtered)/(p_hw_additive_filtered | p_slt_filtered)/(p_dhr_filtered | p_tbats_filtered)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# --- MSE ---
sarima_mse_all_day = rowMeans((df_true[,-1] - df_pred_sarima[,-1])^2) 
hw_additive_mse_all_day = rowMeans((df_true[,-1] - df_pred_hw_additive[,-1])^2) 
tbats_mse_all_day = rowMeans((df_true[,-1] - df_pred_tbats[,-1])^2) 
slt_mse_all_day = rowMeans((df_true[,-1] - df_pred_slt[,-1])^2) 
dhr_mse_all_day = rowMeans((df_true[,-1] - df_pred_dhr[,-1])^2)
rfBLT_mse_all_day = rowMeans((df_true[,-1] - df_pred_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all[,-1])^2)

mse_df <- data.frame(
  rfBLT = rfBLT_mse_all_day, 
  sarima = sarima_mse_all_day, 
  hwa = hw_additive_mse_all_day, 
  slt = slt_mse_all_day, 
  dhr = dhr_mse_all_day, 
  tbats = tbats_mse_all_day
)

# Reshape to long format
mse_long <- pivot_longer(mse_df, 
                         cols = everything(),
                         names_to = "Method",
                         values_to = "MSE")

# Rename methods to match the desired labels
method_labels <- c("rfBLT", "SARIMA", "HWA", "STL", "DHR", "TBATS")
names(method_labels) <- names(mse_df)
mse_long$Method <- method_labels[mse_long$Method]
mse_long$Method <- factor(mse_long$Method, levels = unique(mse_long$Method))

# --- DEFINE YOUR TRUE MIXED RADIANT PALETTE ---
mixed_radiant_palette <- c(
  "rfBLT"  = "#2B6CB0", # Radiant Blue
  "SARIMA" = "#9B2C2C", # Radiant Red
  "HWA"    = "#6B46C1", # Radiant Purple
  "STL"    = "#2F855A", # Radiant Green
  "DHR"    = "#C05621", # Radiant Orange
  "TBATS"  = "#2C7A7B"  # Radiant Teal
)

# Create ggplot
mse_plot <- ggplot(mse_long, aes(x = Method, y = MSE, color = Method)) + # Mapping changed from fill to color
  
  # --- THE FIX: Force inside to be white, adjust border thickness ---
  geom_boxplot(fill = "white", size = 0.8, outlier.size = 1.5) +  
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  labs(
       x = "Methods",
       y = "MSE") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  # --- THE FIX: Use manual color scaling instead of fill scaling ---
  scale_color_manual(values = mixed_radiant_palette)

mse_plot
colMedians(as.matrix(mse_df))
ggsave("D:/Dalhousie University/0. Project/latex/rfBLT/rfBLT seasonal/elec_mse.pdf", plot = mse_plot, width = 5, height = 5, units = "in")
```

```{r}
# --- Coverage Probability ---
# SARIMA
sarima_cover <- coverage_fn(df_true=df_true, df_upper=df_upper_sarima, df_lower=df_lower_sarima)
sarima_cover_long <- as.data.frame(t(sarima_cover$prop_cover[-1])) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Month",
               values_to = "Coverage") %>%
  mutate(Month = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Month)),
         Method = "SARIMA")

# HW additive
hw_cover <- coverage_fn(df_true=df_true, df_upper=df_upper_hw_additive, df_lower=df_lower_hw_additive)
hw_cover_long <- as.data.frame(t(hw_cover$prop_cover[-1])) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Month",
               values_to = "Coverage") %>%
  mutate(Month = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Month)),
         Method = "HW additive")

# TBATS
tbats_cover <- coverage_fn(df_true=df_true, df_upper=df_upper_tbats, df_lower=df_lower_tbats)
tbats_cover_long <- as.data.frame(t(tbats_cover$prop_cover[-1])) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Month",
               values_to = "Coverage") %>%
  mutate(Month = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Month)),
         Method = "TBATS")

# STL
slt_cover <- coverage_fn(df_true=df_true, df_upper=df_upper_slt, df_lower=df_lower_slt)
slt_cover_long <- as.data.frame(t(slt_cover$prop_cover[-1])) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Month",
               values_to = "Coverage") %>%
  mutate(Month = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Month)),
         Method = "STL")

# DHR
dhr_cover <- coverage_fn(df_true=df_true, df_upper=df_upper_dhr, df_lower=df_lower_dhr)
dhr_cover_long <- as.data.frame(t(dhr_cover$prop_cover[-1])) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Month",
               values_to = "Coverage") %>%
  mutate(Month = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Month)),
         Method = "DHR")

# rfBLT
rfBLT_cover <- coverage_fn(df_true=df_true, df_upper=df_upper_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all, df_lower=df_lower_rfBLT_TRS_x11_all)
rfBLT_cover_long <- as.data.frame(t(rfBLT_cover$prop_cover[-1])) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Month",
               values_to = "Coverage") %>%
  mutate(Month = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Month)),
         Method = "rfBLT")

combine_cover_df <- rbind(rfBLT_cover_long,
                          sarima_cover_long, 
                          hw_cover_long,
                          slt_cover_long,
                          dhr_cover_long,
                          tbats_cover_long)

combine_cover_df$Method <- factor(combine_cover_df$Method, levels = unique(combine_cover_df$Method))

df_cover_prob <- rbind(rfBLT_cover$prop_cover[-1], 
                       sarima_cover$prop_cover[-1], 
                       hw_cover$prop_cover[-1], 
                       slt_cover$prop_cover[-1], 
                       dhr_cover$prop_cover[-1], 
                       tbats_cover$prop_cover[-1])

row.names(df_cover_prob) <- c("rfBLT", "SARIMA", "HWA", "STL", "DHR", "TBATS")

round(df_cover_prob*100, 2)
```

```{r}
# --- Coverage Range ---
df_ncol <- ncol(df_true)

# SARIMA
sarima_cr_range_long <- as.data.frame(t(colMedians(as.matrix(sarima_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Day",
               values_to = "Range") %>%
  mutate(Day = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Day)),
         Method = "SARIMA")

# Holt-Winters
hw_cr_range_long <- as.data.frame(t(colMedians(as.matrix(hw_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Day",
               values_to = "Range") %>%
  mutate(Day = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Day)),
         Method = "HW additive")

# TBATS
tbats_cr_range_long <- as.data.frame(t(colMedians(as.matrix(tbats_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Day",
               values_to = "Range") %>%
  mutate(Day = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Day)),
         Method = "TBATS")

# STL
slt_cr_range_long <- as.data.frame(t(colMedians(as.matrix(slt_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Day",
               values_to = "Range") %>%
  mutate(Day = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Day)),
         Method = "STL")

# DHR
dhr_cr_range_long <- as.data.frame(t(colMedians(as.matrix(dhr_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Day",
               values_to = "Range") %>%
  mutate(Day = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Day)),
         Method = "DHR")

# rfBLT
rfBLT_cr_range_long <- as.data.frame(t(colMedians(as.matrix(rfBLT_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("t"),
               names_to = "Day",
               values_to = "Range") %>%
  mutate(Day = as.numeric(gsub("t", "", Day)),
         Method = "rfBLT")

combine_cr_range_df <- rbind(
  rfBLT_cr_range_long,
  sarima_cr_range_long,
  hw_cr_range_long,
  slt_cr_range_long,
  dhr_cr_range_long,
  tbats_cr_range_long
)

combine_cr_range_df$Method <- factor(combine_cr_range_df$Method, levels = unique(combine_cr_range_df$Method))

df_cover_range <- rbind(colMedians(as.matrix(rfBLT_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])),
                        colMedians(as.matrix(sarima_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])), 
                        colMedians(as.matrix(hw_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])),  
                        colMedians(as.matrix(slt_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])), 
                        colMedians(as.matrix(dhr_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])), 
                        colMedians(as.matrix(tbats_cover$cr_range_mat[, 2:df_ncol])))

row.names(df_cover_range) <- c("rfBLT", "SARIMA", "HWA", "STL", "DHR", "TBATS")

df_cover_range
```
